name: Ginger-Date Wontons
recipeInstructions:
The palm date is the one western cooks are familiar with, the best of which are the large, moist, sweet Medjool from California.
Combine filling ingredients and mix well. To make each wonton, place 1 teaspoon filling in the center of each wrapper; keep remaining wrappers covered. Brush edges of the wrapper with water and fold the wrapper in half to form a triangle. Pinch the edges to seal. Pull the corners of the folded side together, moisten one corner, press to seal. Keep finished wontons covered. Heat oil to 360°F at medium-high heat. Deep fry until golden, turning occasionally, 2-3 minutes. Drain. Serve hot or cold.
